description:
Enpass is a cross-platform password management app to securely store passwords and other credentials in a virtual vault locked with a master password. Unlike most other popular password managers, Enpass is an offline password manager.


What's new
This release improves credential handling in the browser extension, expands passkey compatibility across more websites and includes several fixes.
- Improved autosave behavior When saving or updating logins tied to your registered business account, items are now more reliably saved to the Business Primary Vault, improving vault selection accuracy during autosave.
- Improved handling of password change on websites Enpass will now identify the correct login item even when the username is not available, making password updates more reliable.
- Expanded passkey compatibility Added support for passkey authentication in iframes. Introduced support for passkey signals provided by relying parties, enabling automatic update of metadata and cleanup when you delete or update a passkey from the account page on a website.
- Resolved an issue with Windows Hello Fixed an issue where users had to manually click the Windows Hello prompt to unlock the app in certain scenarios.
- Resolved network reachability issue Fixed an issue that could cause DNS resolution failures in certain corporate VPN environments.
Support & feedback
Need help or have feedback?
Visit our support page [https://support.enpass.io/home.htm ]
